title: THE ROLE OF MODERN EXCAVATORS ECG-20K IN INTENSIFYING MINING OPERATIONS AT THE "YOSHLIK-1" OPEN-PIT MINE OF ALMALYK MMC AS PART OF THE DEPOSIT DEVELOPMENT PROJECT
author: Akmal Bekmurodovich Pardayev Branch of the Almalyk State Technical University named after Islam Karimov
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This article examines the role of modern excavators of the EKG-20K type, which are used in mining and loading operations to accelerate the extraction and loading of overburden and fragmented rock in stratified and ore deposits, as well as to create a safe working area.  Keywords:  bucket, excavator, rock, cutting element, durability, material, extraction, loading.
steps_raw: This article examines the role of modern excavators of the EKG-20K type, which are used in mining and loading operations to accelerate the extraction and loading of overburden and fragmented rock in stratified and ore deposits, as well as to create a safe working area.  Keywords:  bucket, excavator, rock, cutting element, durability, material, extraction, loading.
